# OpenAI Developer Community Content Extraction

## Community Forum Overview
The OpenAI Developer Community serves as a discussion platform where developers can connect while building with OpenAI's APIs and developer tools.

## Featured Discussions & Topics

**Recent Announcements:**
- "Welcome to community.openai.com!" (August 25, 2023)
- Codex for Students program offering "$100 in credits for US and Canada"

**Active Discussion Categories:**
- API development and integration
- ChatGPT Apps and plugins
- Image generation (DALL-E 3, ImageGen, GPT-4o)
- Codex application (Windows and CLI versions)
- Codex and Codex CLI
- ChatGPT Apps SDK
- Prompt engineering techniques
- Commerce integration questions
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) implementation
- Bugs and Feedback sections
- Community projects

## New Models & Features (March-April 2026)
- April 2026 Community Gallery (April 5, 2026) - Spring/New Beginnings generative art showcase (133 replies, 702 views)
- ChatGPT in CarPlay for All Plans (April 4, 2026) - Apple CarPlay integration expanded to all ChatGPT subscription tiers
- Codex Plugin for Claude Code (April 4, 2026) - New plugin bringing Codex capabilities to Claude Code environment
- Codex Team Licensing Model (April 4, 2026) - "Bring Codex to your team without fixed seat costs" - flexible team deployment
- ChatGPT Pro new $100/month tier (April 2026) - "5x more Codex usage than Plus"
- DALL-E Shutdown Notice (May 12, 2026) - Service discontinuing; users advised to migrate
- GPT-5.4 Pro and Thinking models released (March 25, 2026) - new model versions with significant community interest
- Open Responses API for open source community (March 25, 2026) - new API capability for open-source ecosystem
- GPT-5.4-mini/nano - Newly available models with complimentary daily token allocations
- GPT Realtime with SIP Endpoint - Voice/communication capability
- gpt-realtime-1.5 is live in Realtime API (March 24, 2026)
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) Connectors - Integration discussions and OAuth authentication
- MCP Apps Integration - Model Context Protocol apps integration with ChatGPT, including tool support and notification systems
- ChatGPT Apps SDK - Active development with ui/notifications, tool-result handling, and model context updates
- Chatkit-js on Managed Backend - Framework supporting function tools
- Responses API - Updated file handling; new background mode for file input (March 25, 2026)
- Computer Use Feature - Across multiple GPT-5.x model variants
- Agent Builder - Platform with guardrails functionality
- Playwright MCP integration requiring approval workflows in latest Codex update
- Conversations API - Response compaction features for managing conversation length

## Models & Services Discussed (As of April 10, 2026)
- GPT-5.4 reported as "too much sensitive" and incorrectly reporting knowledge cutoff as 2024-06
- GPT-5.4-mini - Billing charged per 1M token group rather than 10M token group
- GPT-5.3-Codex - Subject of credit-wasting complaints
- GPT-5.2 - LogProbs support reportedly removed
- GPT-Realtime 1.5 - Voice expressiveness and accent quality regressions noted (March 31, 2026)
- Realtime API - WebSocket implementation lacking proper CLOSE frame handling
- Costs API - Pagination issues with invalid page tokens (March 31, 2026)
- Fine-tuning - Jobs stuck in queued state reported
- MCP Connectors - Custom connectors showing disabled tools issue
- ChatGPT Apps SDK - Widget URI versioning and app submission concerns

## Platform Features
- Search functionality
- Category-based organization
- User reputation system (Original Poster, Frequent Poster designations)
- Discourse-powered infrastructure

Updated: 2026-04-10
